## Summary

## Checks

- [ ] `make check`
- [ ] `go build ./...`
- [ ] Manual smoke completed when touching TUI, daemon, auth, cache, or release behavior

## Privacy and Security

- [ ] No OAuth tokens, credentials, private Workspace data, local logs, daemon
      sockets, or personal screenshots are included
- [ ] Docs updated for user-facing commands, flags, config keys, cache paths, or
      release behavior
